description: A tumultuous scene set in a Roman forum with classical architecture — columns, pediments, and public buildings. A large crowd of toga-clad Romans fills the scene, many gesturing dramatically. At center, figures converge around a fallen or collapsing figure. Some raise their arms in protest or horror. Roman soldiers in helmets and armor are visible at the edges. The scene captures a moment of extreme public agitation and drama, with the crowd pressing in from all sides. The palette is muted with warm earth tones.
